title: ホープフルSの後に・進む覚悟

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a satisfactory victory in the G1 Hopeful
Stakes, King Halo announces her intention to
continue on to the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tour can only be attempted once, making the
competition fierce. She'll be pressed to win three
races: the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, King Halo's next goal is the first of the
Triple Crown, the Satsuki Sho.
